name: Israeli Honey Orange Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Butter or Margarine, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients: flour, wheat germ, sugar, orange peel, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the wet ingredients: melted butter (or margarine), honey, orange juice, and eggs.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir quickly until just combined.
4. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes at 375°F, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Makes 24 muffins.
